title: Vitest configuration for UI project with React and coverage reporting
purpose: Configures the test environment, plugins, and coverage settings for a React-based UI project using Vitest.
module_context: Exports a default configuration object for Vitest that includes React plugin, jsdom environment, global test setup, coverage reporting, and path aliases for project modules.

steps.content: Configure the Vite project with React plugin support.
Set up test environment with global variables and jsdom.
Specify the test setup file to be loaded before tests.
Enable code coverage reporting using v8 provider.
Define path aliases for project modules including components, hooks, stores, and lib directories.
Set browser build alias for mermaid-wireframe to avoid Node.js dependencies.
